source_rationale: CD3E is a core T cell receptor complex component, marking this cluster as T lymphocytes
CD69 is an early activation marker on T cells, indicating activated T cell state
KLRB1 (CD161) is a marker of NK/NKT cells, suggesting NK T cell or innate-like T cell identity
Granzyme B is a cytotoxic effector molecule expressed by activated cytotoxic T and NK cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by effector/memory T cells and NK cells
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein characteristic of NK and cytotoxic T cells
IL7R marks memory T cells and is important for T cell homeostasis
CD8A identifies cytotoxic CD8+ T cells within this activated T cell cluster
Granulysin is a cytolytic protein specific to cytotoxic T and NK cells
Interferon-gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T cells and NK cells
Alpha-crystallin A is a lens-specific protein, indicating lens epithelial/fiber cells
Beta-crystallin B2 is a major structural protein of the ocular lens
FOXE3 is a transcription factor essential for lens development and differentiation
Gamma-crystallin S is a lens-specific structural protein
GJA8 (connexin 50) is a gap junction protein specific to lens fiber cells
PROX1 is a transcription factor critical for lens fiber cell differentiation
PITX3 is a transcription factor essential for lens and anterior segment development
SOX2 is expressed in lens progenitor cells and important for lens development
GJA3 (connexin 46) is a gap junction protein specific to lens fiber cells
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed on B cells and antigen-presenting cells
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell lineage marker

BLK is a Src family kinase specifically expressed in B lymphocytes
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed on B cells for antigen presentation
Immunoglobulin J chain is expressed in B cells transitioning to plasma cells
IRF8 is a transcription factor important for B cell differentiation
